site.title: CraftClass
site.tagline: A visual crafting companion for Path of Exile 2. See your affix slots fill in real time, browse every base and mod, and run live simulations without a single spreadsheet.
site.description: A friendly visual companion for Path of Exile 2 crafting. Browse bases, mods, currency, and run live simulations.
site.footer.disclaimer: CraftClass · unaffiliated fan tool for Path of Exile 2.
site.howworks.title: How this works
site.howworks.body1: Data is scraped from {poe2db} and refreshed each patch. The simulator uses a weighted mod pool model (with a tier-based fallback when community weights aren't available) so every click is a real random draw from the pool.
site.howworks.body2: Veteran tip: drop community-maintained weights into {weightsfile} and run {cmd} to unlock accurate probability calculations.

currency.title: Currency
currency.subtitle: Every crafting currency in Path of Exile 2, grouped by what they do.
omens.title: Omens
omens.subtitle: Omens are consumable modifiers that alter the next currency operation you perform. They're PoE2's way to add precision to otherwise random outcomes.
guides.title: Crafting Guides
guides.subtitle: Curated step-by-step paths for common crafting goals. Pick the difficulty that matches your budget and ambition.
calculator.title: Probability Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Pick a base, choose target mods, and see the chance of hitting them with a chosen currency. Math runs in a web worker so the page stays responsive.
calculator.base.label: Base Item
calculator.ilvl.label: Item Level
calculator.op.label: Currency Operation
calculator.how.title: How It Works
calculator.how.body1: Pick a base item and target mods, then hit Calculate to see the probability of landing at least one of them with a single currency use. The calculator builds a weighted pool from GGG's published drop weights and runs exact combinatorial math or Monte Carlo simulation inside a web worker so the page stays responsive.
calculator.how.step3: Choose Regal Orb (Magic to Rare, +1 affix) as the operation
calculator.how.step4: Search for critical in the mod search box, check a couple of mods
calculator.how.step5: Click Calculate to see the odds of hitting at least one of them
calculator.how.tip: Try a different operation like Alchemy (4 affixes) and see how the odds change.
calculator.how.body2: Exact method computes probability via combinations (fast, accurate for small pools). Monte Carlo simulates 100,000 random rolls (better for complex scenarios with many target mods).
calculator.warning: Heads up: no per-base weights detected for this item. Results use the slot-wide DropChance values scraped from poe2db's ModsView, falling back to a tier-based pseudo-weight when even those are missing. For per-base accuracy, drop community weights into {weightsfile}.
